module.name: sensor
comments: Sensor module — demonstrates all SRM features
Provides counter pool, config table, and debug logging

local_storages.name: counter_pool
comments: Read-write counter pool shared across subsystems

local_storages.name: config_table
comments: Read-only calibration data stored in Flash

local_storages.name: debug_log
comments: Debug-level log strings — disabled in release builds
Set disabled=false to include in Flash

external_storages.name: log_strings
comments: Reuse the log module's readonly string storage

extern_types.name: log_string
comments: Reference the log module's readonly string type

items.name: tick_count
comments: System tick counter — incremented every 1 ms

items.name: calibration_data
comments: Factory calibration blob loaded from file

items.name: log_debug_sample
comments: Per-sample debug print — only present when debug_log is enabled
